Interface IHVCompositeDatumTransformationEditor

Namespace

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("39EDCF6D-89DC-4CC5-A39D-92E31DFA3355")]
public interface IHVCompositeDatumTransformationEditor

Properties

Count

Returns the number of steps in the composite transformation.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Returns a step of the datum transformation.

Parameters

Transform ITransformation
dir esriTransformDirection

CreateHVDatumTransformation(int)

Creates a datum transformation from wkid. The wkid could be either geogtran or verttran.

IHVDatumTransformation CreateHVDatumTransformation(int wkid)

Parameters

wkid int

Returns

IHVDatumTransformation

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

pGT IGeoTransformation

Returns

IHVDatumTransformation

CreateHVDatumTransformationFromText(string)

Creates a datum transformation from text. The text could be either geogtran or verttran.

IHVDatumTransformation CreateHVDatumTransformationFromText(string wkt)

Parameters

wkt string

Returns

IHVDatumTransformation

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateNew()

Creates an hv composite datum transformation from the editor properties.
